About Winters Electric LLC

12+ years serving Boise and surrounding areas

Winters Electric LLC was founded over a decade ago with a simple mission: to provide honest, reliable electrical services to our neighbors in Boise and beyond. We started small, wiring homes in the North End and slowly building a reputation for quality workmanship and unwavering commitment to safety.

Our approach is straightforward: we listen to your needs, offer clear and transparent solutions, and execute our work with precision and care. We value integrity above all else, ensuring every project meets the highest standards of quality and code compliance. We're not just electricians; we're problem solvers dedicated to keeping your home or business powered safely and efficiently.

We are deeply rooted in the Boise community. We support local schools and organizations, and we believe in giving back to the city that has given us so much. From sponsoring youth sports teams to volunteering our electrical expertise for community projects, Winters Electric is committed to making Boise a better place to live and work.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Winters Electric LLC

Trusted electrician professionals serving Boise, ID and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
